title: Simply Vanilla Upgrade
description: A datapck that's aiming to change the natural default look of Minecraft's buildings.
body:
Hi everyone,

This Datapack is aiming to replace the vanilla buildings with "upgraded" versions of themselves to give players a more immersive experience while playing minecraft.


Warning ! : This datapack is currently a work in progress, a lot of features are still missing and you might encounter some bugs, such as weird terrain generation in villages.


Current state of the pack :


IN THE PLAINS BIOME :


  -upgraded versions of all work stations
 
  -upgraded versions of all houses

  -upgraded versions of all decors and new models

  -special loot for buildings listed above

  -upgraded roads and pathways



IN THE SNOWY BIOME :


  -upgraded versions of all work stations
 
  -upgraded versions of all houses

  -upgraded versions of all decors and new models

  -special loot for buildings listed above

  -upgraded roads and pathways


IN THE DESERT BIOME :


  -upgraded versions of all work stations
 
  -upgraded versions of all houses

  -upgraded versions of all decors and new models

  -special loot for buildings listed above

  -upgraded roads and pathways
